title: Warm Vietnamese Lamb Kidney Bowl
description: A comforting and umami-rich dish featuring lamb kidney, perfect for a lazy Sunday meal. Broil to perfection and enjoy the combination of crunchy textures and savory flavors.

ingredients.name: Lamb kidney
ingredients.notes: Rinse and pat dry before using.

instructions: Rinse the lamb kidney under cold water, then pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together coconut oil, grated ginger, minced garlic, fish sauce, soy sauce, and honey.
Place the lamb kidney on a broiler pan and brush the ginger-garlic mixture on both sides of the kidney.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Broil the lamb kidney for 12-15 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
While the lamb kidney is cooking, cook the rice noodles according to package directions.
Once the lamb kidney is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
To serve, place the sliced lamb kidney on top of the cooked rice noodles, garnish with chopped scallions, cilantro, and crushed peanuts.
